en.extract:
The dark-backed weaver (Ploceus bicolor), also known as the forest weaver, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is very sparsely present across central and southern Sub-Saharan Africa.

The '''dark-backed weaver''' ('''''Ploceus bicolor'''''), also known as the '''forest weaver''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is very sparsely present across central and southern [[Sub-Saharan Africa]].
